title: AI-Enhanced Conformer Search via Meta-Dynamics: Benchmarking Against CREST
abstract: We introduce an AI-enhanced meta-dynamics (MTD) algorithm for conformational search, implemented within MLatom and deployed on the Aitomia platform, and benchmark it against CREST across a diverse set of molecular systems.
